title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 20 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 20 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 20 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, the main contract I2305 closed 894, an increase of 1.02% throughout the day. Some traders wereactive to sell, some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.PBF at Shandong port dealt 895-900 yuan/mt; increased 5-10 yuan/mt from last Friday.
